label: Stair Addition
description: Complex stair design in occupied towers. Structural glass treads, cantilevered steel, code-compliant feature stairs that architects want to show clients.

label: Lobby Renovation
description: Visible, high-stakes, full of structural surprises. We make bold lobby ideas possible without disrupting operations or triggering major structural upgrades.

label: Slab Opening
description: Load transfer in constrained structural grids. We handle complex slab penetrations for stairs, voids, and mechanical penetrations in occupied high-rise floors.

label: Slab Infill
description: Retrofit strategies that avoid triggering major code upgrades. We've closed thousands of slab openings across downtown LA high-rises.

label: Partition Systems
description: Lightning-fast partition and ceiling structural support. Lean drawings that answer field questions directly, ready before the GC needs them.

label: Connection Details
stat: Caught before they became field problems
description: Anchors, edge-of-slab, hidden supports that architects can't see and GCs can't invent. We've built our reputation on catching what others miss.
